column1: # Validation tests - required fields, optional fields, spread constraints
# Spread required - concrete values satisfy the constraint
# Spread with pref default - default satisfies the constraint
# Spread with extra keys - constraint plus additional data
# copy of type-constrained map - strips type mark
# key() with type constraint in spread
# key() with pref in spread - default overridden by key()
# copy from spread-constrained map via path ref
# hide inside spread - hides individual values
# optional key with pref - value provided
# optional key with pref - default used
# pref in spread combined with key()
# TODO: parse error - *1|number inside type({...}) confuses parser, | closes map early
# Optional key with type constraint - unsatisfied is dropped
# type() in spread with pref defaults - pref applied through type constraint
# Spread applies across outer conjunct fold
# When spread+child are in one conjunct term and more children in another,
# the spread must apply to ALL children from ALL conjunct terms.
# Spread with plain value across conjunct
# Multiple children in second conjunct term
